title: ditassa ayangannensis
intro: Ditassa ayangannensis is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ditassa ayangannensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in reducing pain and preventing infections. The herbal preparations of Ditassa ayangannensis can be found in various forms, including extracts and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin irritations.
